original_image_tags: A scan of an aged, off-white page with a mottled texture. The page appears blank except for several dark spots and marks near the bottom edge. Specifically, there are two distinct, dark, roughly circular spots located symmetrically in the lower third, resembling ink blots or punch holes. Additional smaller, irregular dark specks and faint smudges are scattered along the bottom margin. No text, stamps, or other markings are visible on the page surface.

elements.description: Blank or back of a page with faint, illegible ghosting or bleed-through. No distinct photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are visible.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is blank or has only minor blemishes with no photographs, sketches, or diagrams, and neither quotes specific text inside images.
